nasb.text: The sons of Salma were Bethlehem and the Netophathites, Atroth-beth-joab and half of the Manahathites, the Zorites.

esv.text: The sons of Salma: Bethlehem, the Netophathites, Atroth-beth-joab and half of the Manahathites, the Zorites.

cnv.text: 薩瑪的子孫是伯利恆人、尼陀法人、亞他綠．伯．約押人、半數瑪拿哈人、瑣利人；

ccb.text: 萨玛的后代是伯利恒人、尼陀法人、亚他绿·伯·约押人、半数玛拿哈人、琐利人，
